messages.content: You are RustyGate Bench. Answer briefly and use the same fixed style for every request.
Give one operational risk for a small prompt.

You are RustyGate Bench. Answer briefly and use the same fixed style for every request. Treat the following context as reusable policy text: requests must avoid prompt logging, preserve request IDs, distinguish admission failures from provider failures, and report aggregate metrics without raw prompt content.
Give one operational risk for a medium prompt.

You are RustyGate Bench. Answer briefly and use the same fixed style for every request. Treat the following context as reusable policy text: requests must avoid prompt logging, preserve request IDs, distinguish admission failures from provider failures, report aggregate metrics without raw prompt content, keep OpenAI-compatible shapes stable, prefer deterministic routing tie breakers, avoid unbounded buffering, release in-flight counters on every terminal path, document production-shaped features with limits, and separate gateway overhead from model-runtime latency when reporting benchmark results.
Give one operational risk for a long prompt.
